name: Configure TCP Communication Link for Cellular-Relay Drone
description: You are an Agricultural Technician at a large farming cooperative. Your drone operations manager has issued a directive requiring all ground control stations to switch from UDP broadcast to dedicated TCP connections to prevent command conflicts on the shared farm network. Read the configuration brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/link_config_brief.txt and configure a new TCP client communication link named 'LTE_Field_Relay' using host 127.0.0.1 and port 5762. Connect via this link and disable UDP autoconnect while ensuring the vehicle remains connected. Write a connection verification report to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/connection_report.txt including the link name, type, host, port, detected vehicle type, confirmation that UDP autoconnect is disabled, and a sign-off statement.
